Hence, the father will be of a devotional type and always charitable in
nature as a result of Saturn getting into contaf:t with Mars in 2nd and then Ketu
in the 5th to himself. He will. also contact Ketu and the Moon in his rounds.
Thus clothes and, dresses of beauty will be of the source of income for. the
native. He will.have two daughters and two sons and will live happily. From
44 onwards upfu the age of 70, he will live peacefully. The native's sister will
be a fortunate girl. Even, the children will be lucky. The little legacy he will
get will be helpful to him. Between 50-53, he will face some difficulties and
will have change in his source of income.
CHART 168
This native will be of a polite nature. He will have medium education;
but will be intelligent. He will have a knowledge of ancient texts. He will
follow his family traditions, will go away from his native place and settle
down in another place. He will be very calculative. He will have brothers and
